{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including specific changes and their justifications.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and strength of the prose.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the illustrative placeholders (numeric values, noise schedule components, flag-to-attention mechanism details) that need to be replaced with actual data.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all aspects of the original content without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content are introduced; the agent identifies and addresses potential issues in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including specific changes and their justifications.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and strength of the prose.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the illustrative placeholders (numeric values, noise schedule components, flag-to-attention mechanism details) that need to be replaced with actual data.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing all aspects of the original content without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced; the agent identifies and addresses potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions.
